items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Lee Mayberry. Arkansas PG was May of May/Day fame. Drafted 23rd by MIL in 92. Was steady backup PG as a pro w/MIL & VAN thru 99. Not a scorer but didn't make mistakes. Averaged between 4.6 & 5.8 ppg his 1st 6 seasons. Now, coaches HS ball.

items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Mitch says heat he, Fox are getting is part of the job: "I don't get into social media...I've been fired 212 times
and we've traded Fox 72 times. We still have to show up
and play tomorrow and I've got to coach. The people that matter, we bond together, we stick together through the highs and lows."

items.title: June 12, 1988: With under 7:00 left in Game 3 of the NBA Finals, Magic Johnson's mother already has the Lakers' postgame meal prepared and waiting in the locker room.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 12, 1988: With under 7:00 left in Game 3 of the NBA Finals, Magic Johnson's mother already has the Lakers' postgame meal prepared and waiting in the locker room.

Christine Johnson's menu: Fried chicken, potato salad, tossed salad, pasta salad, homemade rolls, cake and sweet potato pie.

items.title: Biggest effect of this, as noted, is that the 7-5 guy winds up watching the game-winning tip-in from 3 feet behind the play because he had to be all the way out on the perimeter on the guy with the ball.
